Pseudo:

void Compute(uint32_t rowNum) {
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> xLocal = queueX.DeQue<float>();
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> yLocal = queueY.AllocTensor<float>();
    // Allocate small local arrays for per-row max and sum
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> rowMax = queueMax.AllocTensor<float>(); // size tileRowNum
    AscendC::LocalTensor<float> rowSum = queueSum.AllocTensor<float>(); // size tileRowNum

    // First pass: compute max for each row
    for (uint32_t r = 0; r < rowNum; r++) {
        float maxVal = -FLT_MAX;
        for (uint32_t c = 0; c < columnLength; c++) {
            float val = xLocal(r * columnLength + c);
            if (val > maxVal) maxVal = val;
        }
        rowMax.SetValue(r, maxVal);
    }

    // Second pass: compute sum and then log_softmax
    for (uint32_t r = 0; r < rowNum; r++) {
        float maxVal = rowMax.GetValue(r);
        float sumVal = 0.0f;
        // First compute sum
        for (uint32_t c = 0; c < columnLength; c++) {
            float val = xLocal(r * columnLength + c);
            sumVal += expf(val - maxVal);
        }
        float logSum = logf(sumVal);
        // Compute output
        for (uint32_t c = 0; c < columnLength; c++) {
            float val = xLocal(r * columnLength + c);
            yLocal(r * columnLength + c) = (val - maxVal) - logSum;
        }
    }

    queueMax.FreeTensor(rowMax);
    queueSum.FreeTensor(rowSum);
    outQueueY.EnQue(yLocal);
    queueX.FreeTensor(xLocal);
}
